Thanks for contributing to Coati! A few notes before you open this PR:

- PRs should target the `develop` branch, not `main`.
- Keep the change focused — one logical change per PR.
- Follow Conventional Commits in your commit messages (feat:, fix:, chore:, docs:, etc.).
- Run `pnpm ci:checks` locally and make sure it passes.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets the `develop` branch
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `pnpm ci:checks` passes locally (`check`, `lint`, `test:unit`)
- [ ] Added or updated tests where relevant
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md`, `docs/`, `.env.example`) if behavior, config, or commands changed
- [ ] For UI changes: verified at desktop and mobile viewports

<!-- Anything reviewers should know — tricky trade-offs, follow-ups planned, areas you want focused feedback on. Delete if nothing to add. -->
